reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of recombination and search bias, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links sparse priors, shallow search, and premature hardness-to-vary filtering as joint failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable by search ablations, counterexamples, or systems succeeding in sparse domains despite early rigidity filters.
explanation: Why benchmark success from recombination can mask inability to generate genuinely new explanations.
